title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Update successful
scenario: No notification shown on successful firmware update when Notifications master toggle is OFF in App Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set the Notifications master toggle to OFF.
4. Pair the Poly Bluetooth audio device with the mobile device.
5. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update.
7. Put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
8. Wait for the firmware update to complete.
9. Observe whether any notification appears on the device.
expected: No notification is shown upon successful firmware update completion.
